_about: value_check domain rules · illustrative sample (table/field names are all placeholders, not any specific project). Rule types/fields see the spec at the top of value_check.py; for a real project, create <system>.checks.json in the config directory following this structure.

rules.desc: Illustrative: evolution-chain member count -1 vs that quality's evolvable count. If at runtime it's always capped by quality and the chain overflow = intentional fill-out (the excess members unreachable), then only an advisory hint (not a major block), for the designer to verify whether they really intend to leave unreachable members
Illustrative: the level table's id contiguously covers 1~200, with no gap
Illustrative: the level-up stats bonus is monotonically non-decreasing with level (cumulative value)
Illustrative: the star-up stats bonus is monotonically non-decreasing with star (grouped by same quality + same element)
